title: AntiGEO Entity
description: Schema for an AntiGEO entity record representing a target object discussed or recorded in the risk registry.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for the entity record.

name.description: Primary display name of the entity.

aliases.description: Alternative names, aliases, or common variants for the entity.

domains.description: Related domain strings associated with the entity. Use registrable domains or normalized host-like domain strings.

current_status.description: Current AntiGEO status assigned to the entity.

summary.description: Short description of why the entity is recorded.

tags_topic.description: Topic tags used for pre-search recall and topic-based filtering.

tags_intent.description: Intent tags used for pre-search filtering by user intent or task type.

tags_risk.description: Risk tags used to explain risk patterns and support downstream governance decisions.

notes.description: Additional freeform notes about the entity record.

status_reason.description: Short explanation of the current status assignment.

source_count.description: Optional count of relevant supporting sources associated with the entity record.

related_entities.description: Optional list of related entity identifiers or names.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the entity record was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the entity record was last updated.
